name: ManpowerGroup Inc.
description: ManpowerGroup Inc. is a leading global workforce solutions company that helps organizations navigate the complex world of work. Through its family of brands—Manpower, Experis, and Talent Solutions—the company provides a comprehensive range of services, including contingent and permanent staffing, talent management, outsourcing, and workforce consulting. With a presence in over 75 countries and territories, ManpowerGroup connects millions of individuals to meaningful employment while assisting hundreds of thousands of organizations in acquiring the skilled talent necessary to drive business growth and adapt to evolving market demands in an increasingly digital and interconnected global economy.
